texto: We had a music teacher in sixth grade, and I saw her tune her guitar. I said, 'Whoa. There's a certain way to do this.' I bought a packet of strings - some of mine were broken - and had her tune it for me. For a while, I just kept it like that. But I got the Internet finally, when I was 14, and started learning.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Brittany Howard: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a educacao. O trecho “We had a music teacher in sixth grade, and I saw her tune her guitar. I said, 'Whoa. There's a ce…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que educacao, music, learning pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de learning e internet.

texto: I'm just really impressed by oil paintings - I don't see how people do it! That's the style I like: classic oil paintings. Abstract art just isn't my thing.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Brittany Howard: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de limites e escolhas conscientes.
